grid.x: count of post-acquisition months with >=1 V purchase
grid.t_x: month-index 1..n of last purchase month, 0 if none
grid.n: months from acquisition month to observation date
grid.acquisition: first V-purchase month (born here; not counted as a repeat)
grid.substrate: ventas TIPO_DOCTO=='V' only; multiple buys in one month collapse to 1
